info.name: Vobiz API
info.description:
Complete Vobiz API collection covering all endpoints: Calls, Conferences, Recordings, Account, Phone Numbers, Applications, Endpoints, Trunks, Sub-Accounts, and CDR.

Base URL: https://api.vobiz.ai

Authentication: All requests require X-Auth-ID and X-Auth-Token headers.

item.name: Call
item.description: Outbound calls, call control, DTMF, audio playback, text-to-speech, and recording.

request.description: Initiate an outbound call to a PSTN number or SIP endpoint. Supports bulk calls (up to 1000 destinations using < separator).
Transfer an in-progress call to a different URL for new call flow instructions.

variable.description: UUID of the call to terminate

request.description: Terminate an active call. Returns 204 No Content.
Get a list of all ongoing call UUIDs for your account.
Get real-time information about a currently active call.
Get a list of all call UUIDs for calls currently queued and waiting to connect. Max 20 results.
Get details of a specific queued call.
Send DTMF digits to an active call for automated IVR navigation.
Play audio file(s) during an active call.

item.name: Stop Playing Audio on a Call

request.description: Stop audio playback on an active call. Returns 204 No Content.

body.raw:
{
  "text": "Hello, this is a test message.",
  "voice": "WOMAN",
  "language": "en-US",
  "legs": "aleg",
  "loop": false,
  "mix": true
}

request.description: Convert text to speech and play it during an active call. Supports 29 languages.

item.name: Stop Speaking Text on a Call

request.description: Stop text-to-speech playback. Returns 204 No Content.
Begin recording an active call.
Stop active recording(s) on a call. Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: Conference
item.description: Conference management, member control, audio playback, and recording.

request.description: Retrieve a list of all ongoing conferences.
Get detailed information about a specific ongoing conference including all active members.
Terminate a specific conference and disconnect all participants. Returns 204 No Content.
Terminate all ongoing conferences simultaneously. Returns 204 No Content.
Disconnect a member by terminating their call. Returns 204 No Content.
Disconnect a member while allowing XML flow continuation.
Mute member(s) so others cannot hear them.
Restore audio from previously muted members.
Prevent member(s) from hearing other participants.
Restore audio reception for previously deafened members.

item.name: Play Audio to a Conference Member

request.description: Play audio to specific member(s). Only targeted member(s) hear the audio.

item.name: Stop Playing Audio to a Conference Member

request.description: Stop audio playback for specific member(s).
Begin recording a conference call.
Stop an active conference recording. Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: Recording
item.description: Manage call recordings: list, retrieve, delete, bulk delete, and export.

query.description: Filter by type: trunk or extension

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of call recordings for your account.
Get detailed information about a specific recording.

variable.description: ID of the recording to delete

request.description: Permanently delete a specific recording. Returns 204 No Content.

query.description: Delete recordings on/after this date (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)
Delete recordings for specific call UUID

request.description: Delete multiple recordings matching filter criteria (async operation). Returns 202 Accepted.
Export recordings as a downloadable archive sent via email (async). Returns 202 Accepted.

item.name: Account
item.description: Account details, balance, transactions, and concurrency.

request.description: Retrieve complete account details including pricing tier, credentials, and account settings.
Retrieve the balance for a specific account and currency. Replace 'INR' with your currency code.
Retrieve a list of transactions for a specific account.
Retrieve current concurrent call count and capacity.

item.name: Phone Numbers
item.description: Manage account phone numbers, inventory browsing, purchasing, and releasing.

request.description: Retrieve all phone numbers associated with your account.
Browse available phone numbers in inventory for purchase.
Purchase a phone number from available inventory.
Release (unrent) a phone number from your account.

item.name: Application
item.description: Create and manage applications with call handling URLs and number linking.

request.description: Create a new application with call handling URLs.
Retrieve all applications with pagination.
Get details of a specific application by its ID.
Update an existing application's settings.
Delete an application. Returns 204 No Content.
Associate a phone number with an application.
Remove association between a phone number and application.

item.name: Endpoint
item.description: Manage SIP endpoints for voice communication.

request.description: Create a new SIP endpoint.
Retrieve all endpoints with pagination.
Get details of a specific endpoint.
Update an existing endpoint's configuration.
Delete an endpoint. Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: Trunk
item.description: SIP trunk management including credentials, IP ACLs, origination URIs, and number assignment.

request.description: Create a new SIP trunk.
Retrieve all trunks.
Get details of a specific trunk.
Update an existing trunk.
Delete a trunk. Returns 204 No Content.
Assign a phone number to a trunk group.
Remove a phone number from its trunk assignment. Returns 204 No Content.
Create SIP authentication credentials for a trunk.
Retrieve all SIP credentials.
Update SIP credential settings.
Delete a SIP credential. Returns 204 No Content.
Create an IP Access Control List entry for trunk authentication.
Retrieve all IP ACL entries.
Update an IP ACL entry.
Delete an IP ACL entry. Returns 204 No Content.
Create an origination URI for inbound SIP routing.
Retrieve all origination URIs.
Update an origination URI.
Delete an origination URI. Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: Sub-Account
item.description: Create and manage sub-accounts under the master account.

request.description: Create a new sub-account under the master account.
Retrieve all sub-accounts.
Get details of a specific sub-account.
Update sub-account settings.
Delete a sub-account. Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: CDR
item.description: Call Detail Records for reporting and analytics.

request.description: Retrieve call detail records with filtering and pagination.
